refactor(memory-stage): add missing output signals in memory stage an… refactor(memory-stage): add missing output signals in memory stage an… None
examples.patch:
@@ -18,20 +18,39 @@ ENTITY SP_module IS
 END SP_module;
 
 ARCHITECTURE SP_module_arch OF SP_module IS
+    
+    -- Component Declaration
+    COMPONENT Add_Sub IS
+        GENERIC (
+            WIDTH : NATURAL := 32
+        );
+        PORT (
+            data_in  : IN  STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(WIDTH-1 DOWNTO 0);
+            op_sel   : IN  STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(1 DOWNTO 0);
+            data_out : OUT STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(WIDTH-1 DOWNTO 0)
+        );
+    END COMPONENT;
+    
     -- Internal signals
     SIGNAL sp_current : STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(WIDTH-1 DOWNTO 0); -- Current SP register value
     SIGNAL sp_new     : STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(WIDTH-1 DOWNTO 0); -- New SP after add_sub operation
+    SIGNAL op_sel_sig : STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(1 DOWNTO 0);       -- Control signal for add_sub
     
 BEGIN
-    -- Adder/Subtractor Logic
-    PROCESS(sp_current, inc_sp)
-    BEGIN
-        IF inc_sp = '1' THEN
-            sp_new <= std_logic_vector(unsigned(sp_current) + 1);
-        ELSE
-            sp_new <= std_logic_vector(unsigned(sp_current) - 1);
-        END IF;
-    END PROCESS;
+    
+    -- Map inc_sp to add_sub op_sel: inc_sp='1' => "01" (Inc), inc_sp='0' => "10" (Dec)
+    op_sel_sig <= "01" WHEN inc_sp = '1' ELSE "10";
+    
+    -- Instantiate Add_Sub for SP increment/decrement
+    sp_adder: Add_Sub
+        GENERIC MAP (
+            WIDTH => WIDTH
+        )
+        PORT MAP (
+            data_in  => sp_current,
+            op_sel   => op_sel_sig,
+            data_out => sp_new
+        );
     
     -- SP Register Process
     sp_register: PROCESS(clk, rst)
